channel.title: Pathogen Watch — daily alerts
channel.description: Open-access daily surveillance of human–animal–environmental genomic clusters of Salmonella, STEC, Listeria, and Campylobacter.

item.title: [Salmonella] Nonhuman added: PDS000123456.7
item.description: Cluster PDS000123456.7 (with 3 human case(s)) gained 1 new nonhuman isolate(s). 3 human / 2 nonhuman isolate(s).

item.title: [Salmonella] New cluster: PDS000222001.3
item.description: New cluster PDS000222001.3 with 2 human case(s) and 1 nonhuman isolate(s). 2 human / 1 nonhuman isolate(s).

item.title: [STEC] Human added: PDS_E_001.1
item.description: Cluster PDS_E_001.1 gained 1 new human case(s) (now 2 total). 2 human / 1 nonhuman isolate(s).

item.title: [Salmonella] Nonhuman added: PDS000123456.7
item.description: Cluster PDS000123456.7 (with 3 human case(s)) gained 1 new nonhuman isolate(s). 3 human / 2 nonhuman isolate(s).

item.title: [Salmonella] New cluster: PDS000222001.3
item.description: New cluster PDS000222001.3 with 2 human case(s) and 1 nonhuman isolate(s). 2 human / 1 nonhuman isolate(s).

item.title: [STEC] Human added: PDS_E_001.1
item.description: Cluster PDS_E_001.1 gained 1 new human case(s) (now 2 total). 2 human / 1 nonhuman isolate(s).
